IRM.Title: CVEnumERMHoldCategory
IRM.Description: The category of a hold on a managed Record's disposition.

Term.Description: Records relating to an agency's congressional affairs office's ongoing searches and congressional inquiries
(1) Records retired before contract close-out, final payment, and/or settlement OR (2) Records under review for confirmation of payment, undergoing financial audits, and certifications
Records associated with open FOIA/PA/MDR requests
Records determined by the History Staff to be of historical significance
Records relating to pending Inspector General's office and other offices' investigations, inspections and audits
Records relating to the General Counsel's Office and other offices' ongoing legal actions
Record has classification or dissemination control marking(s) that prevent the record from being transferred to NARA. For example: LIMDIS, RD (Restricted Data) and Declassification Review Pending"
Records associated with ongoing operations, projects and/or programs

(1) Records requiring Records Manager/Custodian review OR (2) Waiting for NARA approval of proposed new disposition OR (3) Records relating to/from office reorganization OR (4) Records retired under wrong Record Control Schedule (RCS) and/or incorrect RCS Item Number OR (5) Inactive records retired prior to cutoff OR (6) Disposition time miscalculated
